name: KRCL – Safety Officer, Project Manager and More – 19 Posts

basic_details.job_title: KRCL Mechanical Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 19 Safety Officer, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) Recruitment 2026 for 19 posts of Safety Officer, Project Manager and More Posts. Candidates with Diploma, B.E/B.Tech can attend walkin. The Walkin Interview Starts on 21-05-2026 and ends on 26-05-2026. For detailed information please visit KRCL official website konkanrailway.com.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Degree in Mechanical / Production & Industrial / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronics / Material Science / Metallurgical Engineering, Diploma in Industrial Safety + Degree/Diploma in Engineering OR Degree/Diploma in Science (Physics/Chemistry)

how_to_apply: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview, and there is no prior online application process.
seo_tags: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited Project Manager / Mechanical
